mapper.insert: INSERT INTO waybill ( qty, start_no, end_no, sender_company_id, sender_company_nm, sender_address, sender_tel_no, sender_manager_tel_no, receiver_company_id, receiver_company_nm, receiver_address, receiver_tel_no, receiver_manager_tel_no, charge_cd, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{qty}, REPLACE(#{startNo}, '-', ''), REPLACE(#{endNo}, '-', ''), #{senderCompanyId}, #{senderCompanyNm}, #{senderAddress}, #{senderTelNo}, #{senderManagerTelNo}, #{receiverCompanyId}, #{receiverCompanyNm}, #{receiverAddress}, #{receiverTelNo}, #{receiverManagerTelNo}, #{chargeCd}, #{regId}, now(), #{chgId}, now(), 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE waybill SET qty = #{qty}, start_no = REPLACE(#{startNo}, '-', ''), end_no = REPLACE(#{endNo}, '-', ''), sender_company_id = #{senderCompanyId}, sender_company_nm = #{senderCompanyNm}, sender_address = #{senderAddress}, sender_tel_no = #{senderTelNo}, sender_manager_tel_no = #{senderManagerTelNo}, charge_cd = #{chargeCd}, receiver_company_id = #{receiverCompanyId}, receiver_company_nm = #{receiverCompanyNm}, receiver_address = #{receiverAddress}, receiver_tel_no = #{receiverTelNo}, receiver_manager_tel_no = #{receiverManagerTelNo}, chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE waybill_id = #{waybillId}
UPDATE waybill SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE waybill_id = #{waybillId}
mapper.select: /* printWaybill */ SELECT wa.qty, wa.start_no, wa.end_no , wa.sender_company_id as senderCompanyId, wa.receiver_company_id as receiverCompanyId, wa.charge_cd /* COALESCE ž†Āžö© */ , COALESCE(wa.sender_company_nm, co1.company_nm) as senderCompanyNm , wa.sender_address as senderAddress , wa.sender_tel_no as senderTelNo, wa.sender_manager_tel_no as senderManagerTelNo /* COALESCE ž†Āžö© */ , COALESCE(wa.receiver_company_nm, co2.company_nm) as receiverCompanyNm , wa.receiver_address as receiverAddress , wa.receiver_tel_no as receiverTelNo, wa.receiver_manager_tel_no as receiverManagerTelNo FROM waybill wa /* JOIN žú†žßÄ */ LEFT JOIN company co1 ON co1.company_id = wa.sender_company_id LEFT JOIN company co2 ON co2.company_id = wa.receiver_company_id WHERE waybill_id = #{waybillId} AND wa.del_yn = 'N'
